metaTitle: Termite Treatment NYC | Termite Inspection & Extermination
metaDescription: Professional termite treatment in NYC metro area. Liquid barrier and bait station systems. Free termite inspection. Licensed exterminators. Long-term guarantee. Call now.
h1: Termite Treatment in NYC — Protecting Your Property's Structure
heroParagraph: Termites cause more property damage in the NYC metro area than most homeowners realize — and they do it silently, inside walls and structural members, for years before detection. Eastern subterranean termites are the primary species, and they're active throughout the outer boroughs, Long Island, Westchester, and New Jersey wherever soil meets wood. An annual termite inspection is the most cost-effective protection any property owner can have. Treatment, when needed, costs a fraction of the structural repairs termite damage eventually demands.

faqs.a: More common than most people think. Eastern subterranean termites are prevalent throughout NYC's outer boroughs and the surrounding metro area. Manhattan high-rises are largely protected by their concrete construction, but wood-frame buildings throughout Brooklyn, Queens, the Bronx, Staten Island, Long Island, and Westchester are all at risk.

Termite treatment ranges from $800–$3,000 depending on the property size, infestation extent, and treatment method chosen. Liquid barrier treatments and bait station systems are priced differently. We provide a detailed written estimate after the free inspection.
